---
title: "Vignette Bibliography"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: yes
    fig_width: 3.5
    fig_height: 3.5
    dpi: 200
    dev.args: list(pointsize=11)
bibliography: ../REFERENCES.bib
link-citations: true
reference-section-title: Complete Bibliography
nocite: |
  @*
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Vignette Bibliography}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
---

# Introduction

This page is generated directly from the shared bibliography file used across
the `acousticTS` vignette tree.

Each cited source is maintained once in
[vignettes/REFERENCES.bib](../REFERENCES.bib) and can then be cited throughout
the theory, implementation, workflow, and example-data pages using standard
Pandoc citation keys such as `[@stanton_1989]`.

# Notes

The bibliography below includes every entry currently retained in the shared
BibTeX file, including literature citations and external software or data
resources referenced elsewhere in the documentation.
